LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS VELO BDBI SUPPORT, INC., BIKES DIRECT.COM'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. GRANTING THE MOTION WILL INEVITABLY DELAY THE TRIAL FOR AT LEAST SIX MONTHS. IF DEFENDANTS PREVAIL AT TRIAL, THERE WILL BE NO NEED TO PURSUE THEIR INDEMNITY CLAIMS. IF THEY DO NOT PREVAIL, THEN THEY WILL STILL BE ABLE TO BRING THOSE CLAIMS IN A SEPARATE LAWSUIT. DEFENDANTS ALSO FAIL TO EXPLAIN WHY THEY DID NOT FILE THEIR PROPOSED CROSS-COMPLAINT AT THE TIME THEY FILED THEIR ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: bennett m. cohen, esq., 415.864.3246, for plaintiff raenear yap; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs VELO BDBI SUPPORT, INC., BIKES DIRECT.COM's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross Complaint is Denied. Granting the motion will inevitably delay the trial for at least six months. If defendants prevail at trial, there will be no need to pursue their indemnity claims. If they do not prevail, then they will still be able to bring those claims in a separate lawsuit. Defendants also fail to explain why they did not file their proposed cross-complaint at the time they filed their answer. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
